title: vault: 5xx HTTP responses mapped to Backend not Unavailable
description: In vault get() and put(), the single 'if \!status.is_success()' branch maps all non-success responses to SecretError::Backend — including 5xx server errors which are transient. Fix: distinguish 5xx (Unavailable) from 4xx (Backend), same pattern as doppler backend. Trigger: Vault server returns 503 or 500 → caller gets Backend → caller does not retry → outage appears permanent.
